name: 25"x65" Carved Beaded Floor Mirror - Threshold™
description:
This Carved Beaded Floor Mirror from Threshold™ makes an elegant addition to any space. This leaning floor mirror features a wooden frame with carved a beaded design on the outer edge for an elevated look. Designed in an arched shape, this floor mirror blends effortlessly with modern or mid-century décor, making it the perfect statement piece for your bedroom, living room or hallway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
